# Task: Implement LRU Cache with TTL

## Objective

Implement a TTL-based LRU cache according to the specification in `spec.md`.

## Files

- `spec.md` — detailed specification for the cache
- `test_cache.py` — test suite that your implementation must pass
- `cache.py` — create this file with your implementation

## Requirements

- Read `spec.md` carefully and implement exactly what it describes
- All tests in `test_cache.py` must pass
- The implementation must be in `cache.py`
